positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial floral pattern featuring stylized geometric representations of glowing nebulae flowers and crystal filigree vines. The design should be centered, utilizing a deep midnight blue and iridescent gold color palette, contrasted with pure black negative space. The style must be a blend of ethereal vaporwave and sacred geometry, rendered as a clean, single-color silhouette graphic suitable for screen printing on fabric. Hyper-detailed line work, strong contrast, perfect symmetry, 4K print quality, minimalist yet rich.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, low quality, watermarks, logos, signature, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, gradients, photographic, photorealism
